SPACEMERCS-THROWING_HAMMER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
{IfUpgraded:show:Gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
|}Gain {CurePower:diff()} [gold]Cure[/gold].
Apply {ScorchPower:diff()} [gold]Scorch[/gold].
Put this {IfUpgraded:show:back in your hand.|on top of your draw pile.}
SPACEMERCS-THROWING_HAMMER.title: Throwing Hammer
SPACEMERCS-HAMMER_STRIKE.title: Hammer Strike
SPACEMERCS-SMOKE_SCREEN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Reduce the cost of a random card in your hand by 1.
SPACEMERCS-SMOKE_SCREEN.title: Smoke Screen
SPACEMERCS-TACTICAL_STRAFE.title: Tactical Strafe
SPACEMERCS-JETPACK.title: Jetpack
SPACEMERCS-REMEMBERED_VOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Increase {IfUpgraded:show:both|one randomly} by 1.
Costs 1 less is Broken Oath is not in your deck.
SPACEMERCS-REMEMBERED_VOW.title: Remembered Vow
